utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details and costs: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan states a health plan at €340/month, mentions comprehensive family coverage, 5% deductibles, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement; explicitly references physical and mental health—meets requirement with costs. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: property coverage at €60/month, replacement value for residence, includes electronics up to €1000—meets requirement with costs. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: travel plan €50/month + assistance €60/month = €110/month total; includes premium international coverage and services—meets requirement with costs. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: Telemedicine Services (€10/month) and International Banking Integration (no cost stated). Since the item requires costs, the integration lacks an explicit cost; thus this item is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly total €520 with component breakdown and annual cost €6,240; includes claimed savings—meets requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists LifeFirst Standard Health Plan, LifeFirst Standard Property Coverage, LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan, 24/7 Travel Assistance, and Telemedicine Services. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage (physical_health) with rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Coverage appears under property_protection (home_content) with rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under mobility_coverage (travel_insurance) with rating 7; 24/7 Travel Assistance is listed under travel_enhancement_services with rating 9; Telemedicine Services is listed under health_enhancement_services with rating 9.
